channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: AP Exclusive: ICE officer in Maine shooting has history of violent behavior, family and records say
item.description: The Immigration and Customs Enforcement officer who shot a Colombian man in Maine this week is an Army veteran who has struggled with serious mental health issues since early childhood, according to close relatives who spoke to The Associated Press.

item.title: Texas flash floods leave at least 2 dead in region devastated a year ago
Weather conditions again brought devastating floods to a vulnerable swath of Texas
